scripts.migrate:create:
node -e "const fs=require('fs');const path=require('path');const name=process.argv[1]||'new_migration';const d=path.join(process.cwd(),'migrations');if(!fs.existsSync(d)){fs.mkdirSync(d,{recursive:true})}const existing=fs.readdirSync(d).filter(f=>/^\d{4}_.*\.sql$/.test(f)).sort();const next=String((existing.length?parseInt(existing[existing.length-1].slice(0,4),10):0)+1).padStart(4,'0');const file=path.join(d,`${next}_${name}.sql`);const base=`-- ${next}_${name}
-- Purpose: describe migration
-- Safe to re-run: no
-- migrate:up

-- migrate:down
`;fs.writeFileSync(file,base);console.log(file);"
